item.needsofnature.tooltip.flower_mix: Crafting ingredient made from three small flowers; used for energy augmenters and diminishers.
item.needsofnature.tooltip.energy_augmen: Use on a mob to permanently increase its energy gain and remove stabilization; consumed on use.
item.needsofnature.tooltip.energy_dimini: Use on a mob to permanently reduce its energy gain; consumed on use.
item.needsofnature.tooltip.energy_stabil: Use on the named mob type to stabilize its energy and prevent active encounters; an augmenter removes it.
item.needsofnature.accessory.tooltip.ign: Stays active during matching injector animations
gui.needsofnature.repair_skin.needs_loom: Needs a loom or crafting table nearby
config.needsofnature.loaded_animations.l: Top = highest priority. External NoN packs override NON and AFW.
Read-only while connected to a remote server.
config.needsofnature.convert_male_v_to_a: Convert male-only V injections to A:
config.needsofnature.require_player_gend: Require gender choice on first join:
config.needsofnature.intiface.libs.insta: Buttplug.io support needs optional Java libraries that are not bundled with NoN.
Download size: %s from Maven Central. A Minecraft restart is required.
No server setting controls this; it only affects your local client.
config.needsofnature.gender_spawn_reset_: This will replace entity rows with NoNpack defaults.
config.needsofnature.liquid_gain_reset_b: This will replace all entries with defaults.
config.needsofnature.offspring_count_res: This will replace entity rows with NoNpack defaults.
config.needsofnature.ui_drag_help: Drag HUD elements to move them. Arrow keys nudge the selected element.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.ui_toolbar_: Show or hide the UI editor buttons.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.ui_toggle_s: Show or hide the currently selected HUD element.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.to: Master switches for major NON systems.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.pl: Client-owned player preferences such as player gender and destroyed skin tint.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.se: Gameplay, override, liquid, pregnancy, debug, and advanced settings.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.ga: Energy, matching, and escape behavior settings.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.va: Override vanilla breeding and milking behavior.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.li: Liquid gain, decay, bottle, and filled-effect settings.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.pr: Pregnancy chance, duration, and egg hatch settings.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.in: Move NON HUD elements for better alignment.
Optional local Buttplug.io toy-control integration for your own animation events.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.category.de: Debug output and performance-oriented advanced options.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.toggle.preg: Globally enable or disable pregnancy mechanics.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.toggle.liqu: Globally enable or disable player liquid tank mechanics.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.toggle.mess: Globally enable or disable mess gain, cleaning, and visible mess overlays.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.toggle.dest: Globally enable or disable destroyed skin damage, repair, manual shearing, and visible destroyed skin overlays.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.toggle.vani: Globally enable or disable all NON vanilla override mechanics.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.initial_ene: Maximum random energy assigned to mobs when they first initialize.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.energy_gain: Global multiplier for natural mob energy gain over time.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.near_animat: Extra energy gain multiplier when a mob sees a nearby active animation.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.player_ener: When player energy is 100-149, nearby viable mobs gain energy as if their natural gain rate were multiplied by this amount.
When player energy is 150-199, nearby viable mobs gain energy as if their natural gain rate were multiplied by this amount.
When player energy is 200, nearby viable mobs gain energy as if their natural gain rate were multiplied by this amount.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.destroyed_s: Extra multiplier applied to the player energy aura while the player has destroyed skin stage 1.
Extra multiplier applied to the player energy aura while the player has destroyed skin stage 2.
Extra multiplier applied to the player energy aura while the player has destroyed skin stage 3.
Extra multiplier applied to the player energy aura while the player has destroyed skin stage 4.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.normal_dama: Percent chance for accepted non-animation player damage to add one destroyed skin damage.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.player_ener: Block radius used for the player energy aura at exactly 100 energy.
Block radius used for the player energy aura at 200 energy.
How often the player energy aura applies bonus mob energy, in ticks.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.loop_second: Default seconds before auto-advancing looping non-peak stages. Stage duration multipliers scale this value per stage.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.peak_loop_s: Default seconds before auto-advancing looping peak stages. Stage duration multipliers scale this value per stage.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_male: Default percentage chance that a newly initialized mob receives only the male gender tag. Global male/female/both values must total 100.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_fema: Default percentage chance that a newly initialized mob receives only the female gender tag. Global male/female/both values must total 100.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_both: Default percentage chance that a newly initialized mob receives both gender tags. Global male/female/both values must total 100.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.allow_playe: If disabled, players cannot freely change their NON gender after it has been selected or assigned.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.require_pla: If enabled, players without a saved NON gender must choose one when joining.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.allowed_sta: Controls which genders are available in the first-join gender selection screen.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.player_gend: Your own gender used for animation eligibility and player .m/.f model selection.
Gender changes are disabled by this server.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.sync_female: Keeps Female Gender Mod's local player gender matched to your NON player gender. Male+Female syncs as Other.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.destroyed_s: Writes Female Gender Mod body settings from your destroyed skin stage. Turning this off stops future writes and leaves the latest written values.
Configure the Female Gender Mod breast settings NON writes for destroyed stages 0-1 and 2-4.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.wildfire_ge: Change gender in Needs Of Nature player preferences.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.wildfire_pe: Change breast settings in Needs Of Nature.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.open_non_pl: Open Needs Of Nature player preferences.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_en: Enables local toy-control through Buttplug.io. Disabled by default.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_se: WebSocket URL of the local Buttplug.io server, usually ws://127.0.0.1:12345.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_au: Automatically connects to Buttplug.io when joining a world.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_st: Sends a stop command to connected devices when leaving a world.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_an: Low vibration while you are in an AFW animation. Reactive impacts temporarily spike above it. Set 0% to disable.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_en: Base vibration while Energized is active, plus heartbeat peak strength synced to the heart pulse. Left slider is base, right slider is pulse peak.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_re: Strength slider and duration in milliseconds for normal reactive impact cues.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_pe: Strength slider and duration in milliseconds for peak reactive impact cues.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_co: Minimum milliseconds between pulses. Use 0 to allow every matching cue.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_st: Current local Buttplug.io connection state and device count.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_li: Whether the optional Buttplug.io support libraries are installed and loaded.
Downloads verified libraries from Maven Central and creates a generated library jar in your mods folder. Requires restart.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_co: Connect to Buttplug.io and scan for devices.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_te: Send a manual test pulse using the configured normal impact profile.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_to: Open toy response settings for vibrators, strokers, and oscillators.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_vi: Configure vibrator baseline and reactive impact pulses.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_os: Oscillator speed while you are in a regular AFW animation stage. Set 0% to disable.
Oscillator speed while you are in a peak AFW animation stage. Set 0% to disable.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.intiface_st: Stroker position used immediately on reactive impact cues.
Stroker position targeted halfway before the next reactive impact cue.
Milliseconds used by the stroker API when moving to max or min on regular reactive impact cues. Set 0ms to disable.
Milliseconds used by the stroker API when moving to max or min on peak reactive impact cues. Set 0ms to disable.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.female_gend: Enables or disables Female Gender Mod breast physics for this destroyed-stage profile.
ON uses separate left/right physics. OFF writes Female Gender Mod's uniboob setting.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.armor_shed_: Client-side visual effect that shows equipped armor flying off when you enter a fresh AFW animation.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.action_soun: Scales NON action sounds resolved from AFW sound cues. Minecraft's normal sound category sliders still apply.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.male_male_c: Roll chance for same-gender male pairings to proceed.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.female_fema: Roll chance for same-gender female pairings to proceed.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.entity_enti: Roll chance for any mob+mob animation attempt before matching.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.multi_actor: Roll chance for joining when total actors would become 3+.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.use_animati: If enabled, in-love animals try to breed through NON animations before spawning a child.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.require_mal: If enabled, animation breeding only allows one male and one female parent.
Disabled because animation breeding is off.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.female_cow_: If enabled, only female (or both-gender) cows can be milked with buckets.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.keep_mess_a: If enabled, player mess values survive death and respawn.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.keep_ripped: If enabled, ripped skin damage and stage survive death and respawn.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.keep_liquid: If enabled, liquid amount and composition survive death and respawn.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.keep_pregna: If enabled, pregnancy state survives death and continues after respawn.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.allow_craft: If enabled, crafting tables can also repair ripped clothing. Looms always work.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.attack_hits: Base A/D hits needed to escape an attack animation.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.attack_deca: How quickly escape progress decays per second while not pressing.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.attack_esca: How strongly low health reduces escape progress. 0% disables the health penalty, 100% is normal, 200% is harsher.
How long the player is protected from normal damage after escape damage is applied.
How long new animations are blocked after escaping an attack animation.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.post_escape: Maximum nearby 70+ energy mobs that immediately start chasing after a successful attack escape. Set to 0 to disable.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.block_anima: If enabled, automatic NoN mob-player starts are skipped while the player is riding a living mount such as a horse, pig, or strider.
If enabled, automatic NoN mob-player starts are skipped while the player is riding a non-living vehicle such as a boat or minecart.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.attack_outc: How many peaked attack animations a mob can have in 10 minutes before its energy is locked to 0 for the failsafe cooldown.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.attack_crea: If enabled, mobs may attack and start attack animations on creative players.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.last_defeat: If enabled, lethal mob damage can leave the player at half a heart and start a defeated animation instead of death.
Minimum mob energy required to trigger last defeated rescue.
Nearby mob search radius used if the damaging mob cannot trigger a valid rescue.
Cooldown after a rescue before the same player can be rescued again.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.pregnancy_c: Chance that a peaked player animation starts pregnancy.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.pregnancy_d: How many real-time minutes pregnancy lasts before hatch-ready.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.pregnancy_e: Default hatch time in minutes for pregnancy egg entities.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.pregnancy_a: If enabled, tameable pregnancy offspring are automatically tamed or bonded to the player that spawned them.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.pregnancy_f: If enabled, hostile pregnancy offspring are prevented from targeting any player.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.offspring_c: Open the per-entity pregnancy profile editor.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_tank: Maximum amount of liquid the player tank can hold.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_deca: How many ml are drained per second from the player liquid tank.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.peak_xp_per: Experience spawned per XP-eligible ml after a peaked animation. Default is 0.0667, equal to 1 XP per 15 ml.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_pudd: Lifetime in seconds of spawned liquid puddle particles.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.filled_stag: Movement speed multiplier while in Filled stage 1.
Movement speed multiplier while in Filled stage 2.
Movement speed multiplier while in Filled stage 3.
Jump multiplier while in Filled stage 1.
Jump multiplier while in Filled stage 2.
Jump multiplier while in Filled stage 3.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_gain: Open the per-entity liquid gain and color override editor.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_spaw: Open the per-entity gender spawn chance editor. Existing mobs keep their current gender.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.scan_budget: Max mob scan operations per world tick before skipping additional scans.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.debug_chat_: Controls which NON debug chat categories are shown.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.debug_spin_: Client-side visual override: replace AFW animations with simple spin debug clips.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.convert_mal: If enabled, male-only players may use V-injector animations and treat those peaks as A for tank and mess behavior.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.destroyed_s: Hex RGB tint used for the generated destroyed skin fallback. Leave empty to auto-detect from your skin.
Open your full skin texture and click a pixel to use its color.
Disabled because config/needsofnature/destroyed_skin.png is present. Custom destroyed skins ignore the generated skin tint.
Disabled because the Destroyed Skin System is off in Toggles.
Disabled because the selected default skin has its own destroyed skin texture. Default destroyed skins ignore the generated skin tint.
Disabled because the Destroyed Skin System is off in Toggles.
Clear the manual tint so NON auto-detects it from your skin again.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.loaded_anim: View all loaded AFW animation definitions and runtime GeckoLib resource status.
Reorder external NoN packs. Changes auto-reload while in a world.
Reset external NoN pack order to default alphabetical order.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_gain: Add a new entity liquid row.
Reset all liquid gain/color rows to defaults.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_spaw: Add a new entity gender spawn row.
Reset entity gender spawn rows to NoNpack defaults.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.offspring_c: Add a new entity pregnancy profile row.
Reset pregnancy profile rows to NoNpack defaults.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.gender_spaw: Male-only spawn percentage. Row is ignored unless male+female+both totals exactly 100.
Female-only spawn percentage. Row is ignored unless male+female+both totals exactly 100.
Both-gender spawn percentage. Row is ignored unless male+female+both totals exactly 100.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.liquid_gain: Liquid gain in ml granted for this entity when used as injector.
Optional entity override color in hex (#RRGGBB).
config.needsofnature.tooltip.entity_prof: Pregnancy chance override for this entity. Leave empty to use the shown default/global value.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.offspring_c: Minimum offspring count. Values are clamped to 1-16.
Maximum offspring count. Values below min are raised to min.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.entity_prof: Entity id to spawn from this pregnancy. Empty uses the source entity.
Open egg settings for this source entity.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.egg_profile: Egg render and hitbox scale at spawn.
Egg render and hitbox scale at hatch time.
Optional full texture id, for example needsofnature:textures/entity/pregnancy_egg/default.png.
Egg health in raw Minecraft health points.
Reset these egg fields to the current NoNpack defaults.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.apply: Apply changes without leaving this screen.
config.needsofnature.tooltip.reset: Reset this value to its default.
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.need: Splash Potion of Energy Relief II
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.n: Lingering Potion of Energy Relief II
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.need: Splash Potion of Fertility Increaser II
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.n: Lingering Potion of Fertility Increaser II
screen.needsofnature.gender_selection.pe: This server does not allow free gender changes later.
screen.needsofnature.gender_selection.ch: This choice can be changed later in Player Preferences.
screen.needsofnature.gender_selection.su: Choose how NON should treat your player.
debug.needsofnature.join_stage_disallows: Current animation stage is not accepting joins right now.
debug.needsofnature.mob_wants_join: Mob %s wants to join your animation (energy %s, anim %s).
debug.needsofnature.player_join_no_expan: Could not join: no matching expanded animation.
debug.needsofnature.player_join_denied_b: Could not join: you are already in an animation.
debug.needsofnature.post_escape_gather_s: %s nearby mobs start chasing after your escape.
debug.needsofnature.mob_join_no_expanded: %s could not join: no matching expanded animation.
debug.needsofnature.energy_locked_attack: %s is on attack cooldown; energy is locked to 0.
debug.needsofnature.attack_blocked_gathe: Blocked direct attack %s -> %s (both actors are pending/active).
debug.needsofnature.attack_blocked_energ: Blocked direct attack %s -> %s (mob has energy > 70 while player is animation-busy).
debug.needsofnature.no_defeat_tag_animat: No defeat-tag animation matched for player; skipping defeated queue.
debug.needsofnature.missing_entity_bottl: Missing bottle mapping for %s liquid; using mixed bottle.
debug.needsofnature.missing_birth_animat: No birth animation found for %s; pregnancy was cleared.
debug.needsofnature.missing_birth_cue: Birth animation %s has no 'birth' cue; using stop fallback.
debug.needsofnature.birth_fallback_spawn: Birth fallback spawn triggered on stop (%s).
debug.needsofnature.missing_pregnancy_en: Missing entity type %s for pregnancy spawn.
advancements.needsofnature.root.title: Needs of Nature
advancements.needsofnature.root.descript: Explore the systems of Needs of Nature.
advancements.needsofnature.natural_curio: Reach the peak stage of any NoN animation.
advancements.needsofnature.favouritism.d: Fill your tank completely with liquid from only one entity type.
advancements.needsofnature.messed_up.des: Reach maximum mess of every type at the same time.
advancements.needsofnature.group_activit: Take part in an animation with four or more actors.
advancements.needsofnature.tossed_around: Get thrown into five defeated animations in a row.
advancements.needsofnature.collectors_ha: Fill 25 bottles from your liquid tank.
advancements.needsofnature.field_researc: Gain liquid from five different entity types in one in-game day.
advancements.needsofnature.bad_idea_beac: Have full player energy while your skin is fully destroyed.
advancements.needsofnature.productive_pr: Complete a pregnancy that produces more than one offspring or egg.
advancements.needsofnature.emergency_sna: Receive an injector type M hunger reward while hungry, or drink an entity liquid bottle.
advancements.needsofnature.stable_diet.d: Trigger Emergency Snack three times in a row without eating or drinking anything else.
advancements.needsofnature.acquire_hardw: Start a manual peak animation with a held item.
